## Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New source
- [ ] 🚀 New feature
- [ ] 🎨 CSS / UI improvement
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / CI

## For new sources — checklist
- [ ] Source JSON in `insposearch/sources/your-source-id.json`
- [ ] Tested with at least 3 different search terms
- [ ] Images are public domain or CC-licensed
- [ ] CORS works directly (or proxy is documented)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes

## For code changes — checklist
- [ ] No new errors (`get_errors` / ESLint clean)
- [ ] Tested in Chrome and Firefox
- [ ] No new hardcoded secrets or keys
- [ ] Mobile layout not broken
